title: NBME Normalized Question
description: Intermediate normalized representation of one NBME question, produced by the LLM extraction stage. Not yet in final app storage format.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version identifier. Must always be 'nbme-normalized-question-v1'.

sourceFile.description: Filename of the source chunk JSON (e.g. 'NBME_Psych_9_chunks.json').

sourceQuestionNumber.description: The question number as detected in the source raw text.

questionId.description: Zero-padded question identifier matching the chunkId (e.g. 'q001').

stem.description: The full clinical vignette and question text, verbatim from source. Must not be truncated, paraphrased, or rewritten.

choices.description: Answer choices extracted verbatim from source.

correctAnswer.description: Letter of the correct answer. Must match one of the choice labels. Never invented — if absent from source, set to empty string and add a warning.

educationalObjective.description: The educational objective statement, verbatim from source if present. Empty string if absent.

correctExplanation.description: Explanation for why the correct answer is correct, verbatim from source. Empty string if absent.

label.description: The choice letter this explanation applies to.

reviewPearl.description: One-line high-yield memory anchor derived from the question. Empty string if not extractable.

retrievalTag.description: Short concept tag encoding the exact tested idea (e.g. 'PTSD duration threshold'). Empty string if not extractable.

tags.description: Additional topic/concept tags for this question. May be empty.

figures.description: Figure references found in the question. Empty array if none.

figureId.description: Unique figure identifier within this question (e.g. 'Figure_Q25_Lab').

location.description: Where the figure appears in the question.

visibleText.description: Text rows visible in the figure (lab values, table cells).

tables.description: Structured tables extracted from the question. Empty array if none.

warnings.description: Issues detected during extraction. Each entry is a plain-text warning string.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence. 'high': all required fields extracted cleanly. 'medium': minor gaps or ambiguities. 'low': significant missing content, ambiguous source, or contamination detected.
